scenarios.title: Where Our Conduits Work
scenarios.subtitle: Field-proven in construction, infrastructure, and industrial installations across {countries}+ countries.

item1.title: Underground Pre-Burial
item1.desc: Pre-bent conduits for direct burial. Consistent bend radius eliminates field cracking under soil pressure.
item1.quote: "The bends arrived ready to install. Saved us 2 days on site." — Project Manager, UAE

item2.title: Commercial & Data Center
item2.desc: Complete conduit solutions for high-density electrical infrastructure across multi-story projects.
item2.quote: "Consistent quality across 3 data center builds." — Project Director, UAE

item3.title: Municipal Infrastructure
item3.desc: Up to 168mm diameter for underground cable protection in power distribution and telecom networks.
item3.quote: "Big pipes, tight tolerances. They delivered." — City Engineer, Southeast Asia

cta.heading: Need {marketLabel} conduit fittings?
cta.description: Request a quote or ask about specifications, MOQ, and lead times.

north-america.label: UL / ASTM Series
north-america.description: PVC conduit fittings engineered to UL 651 and ASTM D1785 standards for the North American electrical market. Available in Schedule 40 and Schedule 80.

australia-new-zealand.label: AS/NZS 2053 Series
australia-new-zealand.description: PVC conduit fittings manufactured to AS/NZS 2053 standards for Australian and New Zealand electrical installations. Medium and heavy duty ratings.

mexico.label: NOM Series
mexico.description: PVC conduit fittings compliant with NOM-001-SEDE standards for the Mexican electrical market.

europe.label: IEC Series
europe.description: PVC conduit fittings manufactured to IEC 61386 standards for European electrical installations.

pneumatic-tube-systems.label: PETG Pneumatic Tubes
pneumatic-tube-systems.description: PETG pneumatic tube systems for hospital logistics and automated material transport.

conduit-sweeps-elbows.label: Conduit Sweeps & Elbows
conduit-sweeps-elbows.description: PVC conduit sweeps and elbows in standard angles. Bell end and plain end options available.

couplings.label: Couplings
couplings.description: PVC conduit couplings for joining straight conduit sections. Double-bell design for secure connections.

conduit-pipes.label: Conduit Pipes
conduit-pipes.description: Rigid PVC conduit pipes in Schedule 40 and Schedule 80 wall thicknesses.

conduit-bends.label: Conduit Bends
conduit-bends.description: PVC conduit bends in standard angles. Plain and bell end options for AS/NZS 2053 installations.

bellmouths.label: Bellmouths
bellmouths.description: PVC bellmouth fittings for conduit termination. Flared entry protects cable insulation during pulling.

couplings.label: Couplings
couplings.description: PVC conduit couplings for AS/NZS 2053 conduit systems. Double-bell and flared connector options.

conduit-pipes.label: Conduit Pipes
conduit-pipes.description: Rigid PVC conduit pipes in medium and heavy duty ratings for Australian and NZ installations.

conduit-bends.label: Conduit Bends
conduit-bends.description: PVC conduit bends compliant with NOM-001-SEDE for Mexican electrical installations.

couplings.label: Couplings
couplings.description: PVC conduit couplings for NOM-compliant conduit systems.

conduit-pipes.label: Conduit Pipes
conduit-pipes.description: Rigid PVC conduit pipes manufactured to NOM standards.

conduit-bends.label: Conduit Bends
conduit-bends.description: PVC conduit bends manufactured to IEC 61386 standards for European electrical installations.

couplings.label: Couplings
couplings.description: PVC conduit couplings for IEC 61386 conduit systems.

conduit-pipes.label: Conduit Pipes
conduit-pipes.description: Rigid PVC conduit pipes manufactured to IEC 61386 standards.

petg-tubes.label: PETG Tubes
petg-tubes.description: PETG pneumatic transport tubes for hospital logistics systems. Clear and durable.

fittings.label: Fittings
fittings.description: Fittings and connectors for PETG pneumatic tube systems.

instructions.title: How to Use This Demo

instructions.step4: Use the React Scan toolbar in the bottom-right corner for detailed analysis
